tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Score an LLM output or agent trajectory against a benchmark rubric. Returns 0-1 score, metric name, reasoning summary, and cryptographically signed receipt. Cost: $0.005 USDC on Base via x402 (EIP-3009). Use benchmark IDs from list_benchmarks (e.g. 'qa-accuracy', 'reasoning-coherence', 'binary-pass-

tools.name: list_benchmarks
tools.description: List all available evaluation benchmarks. Free, no payment required. Returns benchmark IDs, names, descriptions, and per-call pricing in USDC. Current benchmarks: QA Accuracy, Reasoning Coherence, Binary Pass/Fail.

tools.name: get_benchmark
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific benchmark including criteria and rubric.
